primitive_shield.name: Plate-and-hide shield
primitive_shield.description: A hand-carried slab of hide, laminate, scrap plate, or station plastic. It is useful against low-tech threats but ignored by weapons that punch through primitive armor.
primitive_shield.mechanics: Requires one free hand. Sets base AC 13; if the bearer already has AC 13 or better, grants +1 AC instead. Weapons that ignore primitive armor also ignore this shield.

leather_jacks.name: Padded work leathers
leather_jacks.sourceName: Leather jacks, thick hides, quilted armor
leather_jacks.description: Layered hides, quilted pressure cloth, or belter work padding. It is cheap protection for backwater fights and industrial accidents.

brigandine_cuirass.name: Plate-laced cuirass
brigandine_cuirass.description: A rigid low-tech shell of layered plates or dense composite. It stops simple blades well and advertises that the wearer expects violence.

layered_mail.name: Layered mail harness
layered_mail.description: Heavy archaic armor used by militias, reenactors, and places where metallurgy outruns electronics. It is protective, obvious, and tiring.

warpaint.name: Ablative skincoat
warpaint.description: A thin impact-reactive coating disguised as cosmetics, tattoos, or station fashion. It is enough to turn a graze without looking like armor.

armored_undersuit.name: Armored pressure undersuit
armored_undersuit.description: A flexible underlayer worn beneath ordinary clothes or a vac shell. It is popular with couriers who expect checkpoints and bad odds.

secure_clothing.name: Secure stationwear
secure_clothing.description: Business or utility clothing with woven armor panels and discreet seals. It passes most casual inspection outside military zones.

armored_vacc_suit.name: Armored vacc suit
armored_vacc_suit.description: A pressure suit with ceramic strike plates and reinforced seals. It is clumsy in hab corridors but standard kit for ugly EVA work.
armored_vacc_suit.mechanics: Counts as armor and vacc protection in one suit. It is bulkier than a normal pressure suit and should use suit-tear rules where vacuum exposure matters.

deflector_array.name: Microdeflector weave
deflector_array.description: A pretech field lattice hidden in clothing seams. DAVE flags these units as anomalous hardware whenever one appears on a legal manifest.

force_pavis.name: Force pavis projector
force_pavis.description: A compact pretech disc that blooms into a defensive field when braced. It requires a free hand and attracts official attention fast.
force_pavis.mechanics: Requires one free hand. Sets base AC 15; if the bearer already has AC 15 or better, grants +1 AC instead. Counts as pretech defensive hardware.

security_armor.name: Security carapace
security_armor.description: Visible riot and checkpoint armor used by station security, dock police, and corporate response teams.

woven_body_armor.name: Woven ballistic vest
woven_body_armor.description: Older ballistic armor still common in low-budget security lockers and militia stores.

combat_field_uniform.name: Combat field uniform
combat_field_uniform.description: A TL4 battle dress of shock cloth, plates, and ablative coatings. It is legal only where someone has stamped the right orders.

icarus_harness.name: Icarus drop harness
icarus_harness.description: A combat uniform with a crude fall damper and short-duration vacc seals. Every serious drop burns a type A cell.

vestimentum.name: Vestimentum ceremonial shell
vestimentum.description: Ancient ceremonial protection with field emitters hidden under impossible tailoring. It looks ornamental until it stops a blade.
vestimentum.mechanics: Powered armor protection in ceremonial form. Counts as powered armor for immunity to primitive melee weapons, unarmed attacks, and TL3-or-lower firearm or grenade-scale explosives.

assault_suit.name: Assault pressure suit
assault_suit.description: Military powered armor with sealed life support, encrypted comms, low-light sensors, and a type B power draw.
assault_suit.mechanics: Powered armor requiring a type B cell for 24 hours. Includes encrypted military comms, low-light/IR vision, vacc protection while powered, and an energy feed interface for one type A-cell device.

storm_armor.name: Storm assault frame
storm_armor.description: A rare pretech-derived assault suit with exo-augments and superior field control. It is contraband anywhere nervous people write laws.
storm_armor.mechanics: Functions as an assault suit with superior pretech exo-augments. Treat Strength as 4 points higher where the armor's powered frame applies.

field_emitter_panoply.name: Field emitter panoply
field_emitter_panoply.description: A collector-grade defensive lattice built for people who can afford to make a battlefield look like a physics error.
field_emitter_panoply.mechanics: Powered pretech armor built around field emitters. Counts as powered armor and should be treated as rare mission hardware rather than open-market gear.

primitive_bow.name: Handmade bow
primitive_bow.description: A local bow or spring launcher used where quiet, repairable weapons matter more than elegance.

advanced_bow.name: Composite hunting bow
advanced_bow.description: A modernized bow using smart materials, favored by survivalists and habitats with strict firearm controls.

conversion_bow.name: Conversion bow
conversion_bow.description: A force-glazed bow that sheaths arrows in a penetrating field. It is quiet enough for habitat work and strange enough for customs interest.

grenade.name: Fragmentation grenade
grenade.description: A compact explosive with enough spread to make ship crews deeply unhappy about missed throws.
grenade.mechanics: Thrown attacks target AC 10. On a miss, it lands 1d10 meters away in a random direction. Hit or miss, targets within 5 meters take 2d6 damage, with Evasion for half; reduce damage by 1 per AC point above 14.

crude_pistol.name: Shopmade pistol
crude_pistol.description: A dirty single-shot firearm from prison shops, frontier smiths, or emergency fabrication benches.

musket.name: Long blackpowder gun
musket.description: A primitive longarm from worlds where propellant chemistry is easier than microelectronics.

revolver.name: Frontier revolver
revolver.description: A rugged sidearm that tolerates dust, bad maintenance, and bad decisions better than most sleek weapons.

rifle.name: Frontier rifle
rifle.description: A reliable longarm common to hunters, outpost guards, and isolated militias.

shotgun.name: Dock shotgun
shotgun.description: A cheap close-range weapon found in ship lockers, hab farms, and places where walls are close.

semi_auto_pistol.name: Autopistol
semi_auto_pistol.description: A common compact sidearm with higher capacity than a revolver and more parts to foul.

submachine_gun.name: Compact machine pistol
submachine_gun.description: A short automatic weapon built for corridors, boarding actions, and bad-news briefcases.

combat_rifle.name: Combat rifle
combat_rifle.description: The standard long gun of serious security forces and line troops. Possession without paperwork means trouble.

combat_shotgun.name: Breacher shotgun
combat_shotgun.description: A high-capacity shotgun used by boarding teams and riot units when doors and people both need persuading.

sniper_rifle.name: Longwatch rifle
sniper_rifle.description: A precision rifle for security overwatch, vacuum-range interdiction, and assassins with patience.
sniper_rifle.mechanics: Precision weapon with extreme range and single-shot magazine. Best used from prepared positions; normal long-range attack penalties still apply beyond listed normal range.

void_carbine.name: Void carbine
void_carbine.description: A compact sealed rifle designed for vacuum, gloves, and hullside messes.

mag_pistol.name: Mag pistol
mag_pistol.description: A compact coil sidearm that puts small slugs through armor with very little ceremony.

mag_rifle.name: Mag rifle
mag_rifle.description: A full-length coil rifle used by people who want hard penetration without hauling a crew weapon.

spike_thrower.name: Spike thrower
spike_thrower.description: A brutal short-range flechette weapon for boarding corridors and panic distances.

laser_pistol.name: Laser pistol
laser_pistol.description: A standard energy sidearm with clean logistics and poor manners around reflective dust.
laser_pistol.mechanics: Energy weapon recharged from type A cells. Dense thermally resistant particulate clouds can penalize laser fire and cut effective range at the GM's discretion.

laser_rifle.name: Laser rifle
laser_rifle.description: A common energy longarm for trained security and anyone who likes ammunition to fit in a pocket.
laser_rifle.mechanics: Energy weapon recharged from type A cells and capable of burst mode. Dense thermally resistant particulate clouds can penalize laser fire and cut effective range at the GM's discretion.

thermal_pistol.name: Thermal pistol
thermal_pistol.description: A loud compact plasma weapon that hits harder than a laser and gives up reach for it.

plasma_projector.name: Plasma projector
plasma_projector.description: A two-handed plasma weapon built for short, violent work in places where collateral damage is someone else's problem.

shear_rifle.name: Shear rifle
shear_rifle.description: A rare silent pretech rifle that cuts through targets with tightly controlled gravitic shear.

thunder_gun.name: Thunder gun
thunder_gun.description: A pretech grav-disruptor that announces itself as a pressure wave before the target starts coming apart.

distortion_cannon.name: Distortion cannon
distortion_cannon.description: A man-portable pretech disruption weapon that DAVE treats less like a gun and more like a loose disaster.

small_primitive_weapon.name: Small primitive blade
small_primitive_weapon.description: A knife, baton, or other simple hand weapon. It is easy to hide and easy to explain badly.

medium_primitive_weapon.name: Medium primitive weapon
medium_primitive_weapon.description: A sword, axe, spear, or heavy tool from places where a sharp edge remains the local answer.

large_primitive_weapon.name: Large primitive weapon
large_primitive_weapon.description: A two-handed low-tech weapon that relies on leverage, mass, and a user who can swing it.

small_advanced_weapon.name: Monoblade knife
small_advanced_weapon.description: A compact advanced blade or kinetic baton that cuts above its size and hides below most search thresholds.

medium_advanced_weapon.name: Powered boarding blade
medium_advanced_weapon.description: A one-handed melee weapon with a powered edge, heat wire, or impact sheath.

large_advanced_weapon.name: Heavy breach cutter
large_advanced_weapon.description: A two-handed advanced melee weapon built to ruin armor, bulkheads, or anyone standing between them.

stun_baton.name: Stun baton
stun_baton.description: A law-enforcement contact weapon that drops targets without killing them when used as intended.

suit_ripper.name: Suit ripper
suit_ripper.description: A fractal cutting rod tuned to defeat vacc suit repair layers. In space, carrying one is treated as intent to murder.
suit_ripper.mechanics: Every hit against a vacc-suited target counts as a suit tear. Treat possession in space habitats as lethal contraband, not a normal sidearm.

unarmed_attack.name: Unarmed attack
unarmed_attack.description: A rules reference for fists, boots, elbows, and improvised violence. It is not a spawnable inventory item.

heavy_machine_gun.name: Crew-served machine gun
heavy_machine_gun.description: A belt-fed projectile weapon that needs a mount, a firing lane, and a crew that likes paperwork.
heavy_machine_gun.mechanics: Requires a vehicle mount or prepared firing position. Can suppress by spending double ammunition; uncovered targets in the firing area take half damage unless they pass an Evasion save.

rocket_launcher.name: Shoulder rocket launcher
rocket_launcher.description: A guided launcher that is excellent against vehicles and deeply awkward against a single running person.
rocket_launcher.mechanics: Can be shoulder-fired without emplacement. Takes a -4 hit penalty against human-sized or smaller targets.

demo_charge.name: Demo charge
demo_charge.description: A shaped demolition pack used by miners, saboteurs, and engineers who need a wall to stop being a wall.
demo_charge.mechanics: Placed explosive. A demolitions background or Fix-0 can shape the blast to spare most directions.

railgun.name: Vehicle railgun
railgun.description: A scaled coil weapon for vehicles and fixed mounts. It turns ammunition budgets into hypervelocity spray.
railgun.mechanics: Vehicle or fixed-mount weapon. Can suppress by spending double ammunition; each round of fire consumes costly projectile ammunition.

anti_vehicle_laser.name: Anti-vehicle laser
anti_vehicle_laser.description: A hard-target laser optimized for armor, hull skins, and machines that thought distance made them safe.
anti_vehicle_laser.mechanics: Heavy energy weapon using type B cells. Against vehicles and other hard targets, roll damage twice and use the better result.

hydra_array.name: Hydra missile array
hydra_array.description: A sequenced missile rack that splits fire across targets or hammers one target until luck runs out.
hydra_array.mechanics: Vehicle or fixed-mount missile array. Assign up to three attack rolls among targets; each hit rolls damage, but only the best damage applies to each target.

wheatcutter_belt.name: Wheatcutter belt
wheatcutter_belt.description: A vehicle-mounted antipersonnel belt that throws a side-facing storm of fragments.
wheatcutter_belt.mechanics: Vehicle-mounted antipersonnel belt. It does not ignore vehicle armor like most heavy weapons and must be reloaded after use.

vortex_cannon.name: Vortex cannon
vortex_cannon.description: A gravitic shear cannon too heavy for infantry and too illegal for most manifests.
vortex_cannon.mechanics: Vehicle-only pretech gravitic shear weapon. Treat as mission-scale hardware, not personal equipment.

ammo_20_rounds.name: Ammunition pack
ammo_20_rounds.description: A mixed-caliber projectile reload pack standardized for table use rather than real logistics.

ammo_missile.name: Missile reload
ammo_missile.description: A reload for man-portable launchers or small vehicle racks. Civilians do not buy these cleanly.

power_cell_type_a.name: Type A power cell
power_cell_type_a.description: The standard small cell used by personal electronics, tools, and many energy weapons.

power_cell_type_b.name: Type B power cell
power_cell_type_b.description: A larger cell for powered armor, heavy equipment, and vehicle-scale draw.

solar_recharger.name: Foldout solar recharger
solar_recharger.description: A two-meter panel sheet that slowly refills type A cells under decent sunlight.

manual_charge_generator.name: Manual charge generator
manual_charge_generator.description: A resistance-bar charger stripped of its banned psychic assumptions. Strong users can crank a type A cell full with time and sweat.

black_slab.name: Black slab
black_slab.description: A hacker dataslab with intrusion hardware hidden in a civilian shell. Security teams confiscate these on sight.

data_phase_tap.name: Data phase tap
data_phase_tap.description: A handheld scanner and field tap for finding data lines through walls without opening the wall first.

data_protocol.name: Local data protocol pack
data_protocol.description: A black-market bundle of manuals, dumps, and schema notes for one world's locked-down systems.

dataslab.name: Dataslab
dataslab.description: A folding personal computer and comm surface compatible with most station grids.

line_shunt.name: Line shunt
line_shunt.description: A single-use adhesive tap that lets a hacker bridge a nearby line through casing or wall material.

remote_link_unit.name: Remote link unit
remote_link_unit.description: A hardened one-time-pad relay pair for keeping a connection alive while the operator stays elsewhere.

stiletto_charge.name: Stiletto charge
stiletto_charge.description: A pretech intrusion consumable used to burn a narrow opening through hardened data security.

storage_unit.name: Hardened storage unit
storage_unit.description: A rugged data vault for moving sensitive archives without trusting local grids.

tightbeam_link_unit.name: Tightbeam link unit
tightbeam_link_unit.description: A directional data link for quiet point-to-point communication when broadcast logs are a liability.

comm_server.name: Portable comm server
comm_server.description: A base unit that creates an encrypted local comm net for teams operating away from station infrastructure.

compad.name: Compad
compad.description: A small personal comm device for local networks, ship channels, and station services.

field_radio.name: Field radio
field_radio.description: A rugged voice unit that keeps working where consumer grid access does not.

translator_torc.name: Translator torc
translator_torc.description: A collar or clip translator loaded with common human language models and enough accent drift to embarrass itself.

bioscanner.name: Bioscanner
bioscanner.description: A handheld diagnostic scanner for toxins, internal injury, infection markers, and quick genetic reads.

lazarus_patch.name: Lazarus patch
lazarus_patch.description: A one-use trauma compress with sealants, stabilizers, and a diagnostic bite. It buys seconds when seconds matter.

medkit.name: Medkit
medkit.description: A field medical kit with stims, spray bandage, sutures, and enough instructions to keep a trained hand moving.

metatool.name: Metatool
metatool.description: A compact repair wand with cutters, drivers, sealers, diagnostics, and enough adapters to hate losing.

spare_parts.name: Spare parts
spare_parts.description: A standardized repair bundle of seals, couplers, contacts, fasteners, and sacrificial electronics.

tailored_antiallergens.name: Tailored antiallergens
tailored_antiallergens.description: Cheap local counteragents for pollen, hab mold, food additives, and the biology that makes visitors miserable.

toolkit_postech.name: Postech toolkit
toolkit_postech.description: A full TL4 repair kit for ship, station, and field machinery.

toolkit_pretech.name: Pretech toolkit
toolkit_pretech.description: A compact high-grade tool suite for ancient or classified hardware. Most owners do not admit they own it.

bezoar_stim.name: Bezoar infection purge
bezoar_stim.description: A broad-spectrum infection stim used when diagnosis is slower than the fever.

pharmaceutical.effect: Attempts to cure many infectious diseases within 24 hours; some infections are resistant.

brainwave_stim.name: Brainwave psionic stim
brainwave_stim.description: Removed psychic-only pharmaceutical kept as a GM reference for quarantined legacy material.

pharmaceutical.effect: Psychic-only effect removed from the Persephone player catalog.

hush_stim.name: Hush compliance sedative
hush_stim.description: A heavy neurotranquilizer that leaves a subject docile but awake. It is legal only in tightly controlled medical or security contexts.

pharmaceutical.effect: Immobilized or willing targets become responsive only to simple low-stress commands.
pharmaceutical.duration: 1 hour plus 3 hours per Heal level

lift_stim.name: Lift trauma stim
lift_stim.description: A common recovery stim that accelerates healing after the patient is stable enough to benefit from it.

pharmaceutical.effect: After five minutes of rest, heals 1d8 plus the applier's Heal skill. Later same-day applications require higher Heal skill.

pretech_cosmetic.name: Pretech cosmetic stim
pretech_cosmetic.description: A luxury pretech stim substrate that happens to mend tissue while improving skin, scent, or grooming.

pharmaceutical.effect: Heals 1d6 lost hit points and provides minor cosmetic or hygiene effects.

psych_stim.name: Psych combat stim
psych_stim.description: A reckless confidence drug common in black-market military surplus. It makes users brave, capable, and dangerously stupid.

pharmaceutical.effect: Morale becomes 12 and skill checks gain +1, but the user ignores cover and cannot back out after learning a check difficulty.

reverie_stim.name: Reverie combat sedative
reverie_stim.description: A dangerous combat drug that strips panic and urgency alike, leaving a calm shooter with a terrible survival instinct.

pharmaceutical.effect: Allows precision attacks by skill check, but slows action timing and doubles incoming damage.

squeal_stim.name: Squeal interrogation stim
squeal_stim.description: An unreliable interrogation drug that forces factual answers but cannot make a subject reason for the interrogator.

pharmaceutical.effect: Immobilized or willing targets answer factual questions for a short period; unwilling targets may resist one topic.

tsunami_stim.name: Tsunami assault stim
tsunami_stim.description: A short-duration assault stim for expendable troops and desperate boarders. The crash is often worse than the fight.

pharmaceutical.effect: Morale becomes 12, gain 10 temporary hit points and +2 to hit rolls, then lose the temporary hit points at expiry.

atmofilter.name: Atmofilter mask
atmofilter.description: A face mask and belt feed that filters common toxins or draws from a small oxygen bottle.

backpack_primitive.name: Plain backpack
backpack_primitive.description: A simple pack, sack, or frame for carrying stowed gear.

backpack_smart.name: Smart load pack
backpack_smart.description: A TL4 pack with load-balancing straps, vacuum-tolerant fabric, and enough pockets to hide mistakes.

binoculars_optical.name: Optical binoculars
binoculars_optical.description: Simple magnifying optics for scouts who do not want another battery problem.

binoculars_smart.name: Smart binoculars
binoculars_smart.description: Powered high-magnification optics with low-light support and local overlay hooks.

climbing_harness.name: Climbing harness
climbing_harness.description: A strap, piton, and line kit for hullwork, cliffs, shafts, and elevator cores.

glowbug.name: Glowbug
glowbug.description: A palm-sized adhesive light disc that keeps a room lit long enough to regret entering it.

grapnel_launcher.name: Grapnel launcher
grapnel_launcher.description: A powered line launcher for vertical movement, hull access, and hauling loads across bad gaps.

grav_chute_postech.name: Postech grav chute
grav_chute_postech.description: A one-use fall modulator for drops up to local-atmosphere limits.

grav_chute_orbital.name: Orbital grav chute
grav_chute_orbital.description: A pretech one-use chute rated for absurd descents that postech insurers refuse to describe.

grav_harness.name: Grav harness
grav_harness.description: A high-drain flight harness that moves a person awkwardly through open air or low-g service spaces.

instapanel.name: Instapanel
instapanel.description: A compressed ceraplast panel that expands from a cube into a foldable sheet before hardening.

low_light_goggles.name: Low-light goggles
low_light_goggles.description: Powered optics that turn dim service tunnels and night-side rock into workable monochrome sightlines.

navcomp.name: Field navcomp
navcomp.description: A rugged navigation computer for routes, local survey data, and not dying because the map was optimistic.

portabox.name: Portabox
portabox.description: A compact sealed container for tools, samples, evidence, or whatever the crew should not spill.

pressure_tent.name: Pressure tent
pressure_tent.description: A bulky shelter for thin atmospheres, toxic weather, and nights spent regretting the landing site.

rations_1_day.name: Field ration
rations_1_day.description: Shelf-stable calories and salts for one hard day outside the ship's meal cycle.

rope_plain.name: Plain rope
rope_plain.description: Twenty meters of low-tech line. Cheap, bulky, and still useful.

rope_smartline.name: Smartline rope
rope_smartline.description: Twenty meters of compact high-grade line that packs better than old fiber.

scout_report.name: Scout report
scout_report.description: A local hazard and route packet compiled by someone who hopefully went there first.

survey_scanner.name: Survey scanner
survey_scanner.description: A sensor block for quick terrain, atmosphere, radiation, and sample reads.

radiation.effect: Can identify elevated local radiation hazards but does not reduce exposure.

survival_kit.name: Survival kit
survival_kit.description: A belt kit with fire, filter, flare, blade, tarp, glowbug, beacon, and local hazard notes.

telescoping_pole.name: Telescoping pole
telescoping_pole.description: A baton-sized pole that locks into a long rigid support, probe, or ugly improvised club.

thermal_flare.name: Thermal flare
thermal_flare.description: A bright flare that can burn as a signal or launch in an awkward arc.

trade_goods.name: Trade goods
trade_goods.description: A kilo of useful TL4 small goods: lighters, glowbugs, antibiotics, simple tools, and things isolated markets want.

trade_metals.name: Trade metals
trade_metals.description: A kilo of gold, platinum, synthetic gems, or other portable value useful where credits mean less than weight.

scrap_copper_spool.name: Scrap copper spool
scrap_copper_spool.description: A heavy spool of stripped conductor wire, still clean enough for repairs, bribes, or fabrication feedstock.

vacuum_sealant_roll.name: Vacuum sealant roll
vacuum_sealant_roll.description: A roll of pressure-rated patch tape for temporary suit, hose, and panel repairs in hard vacuum.

pressure_manifold_valve.name: Pressure manifold valve
pressure_manifold_valve.description: A salvageable regulator valve for life support, coolant, and fuel plumbing.

fluid_dynamics_manual.name: Fluid dynamics manual
fluid_dynamics_manual.description: A battered technical manual with usable notes on pumps, vents, propellant lines, and pressure math.

thermal_paste_tube.name: Thermal paste tube
thermal_paste_tube.description: A tube of industrial thermal compound useful for electronics, reactor auxiliaries, and heat sink repairs.

eva_tether_set.name: EVA tether set
eva_tether_set.description: A clipped set of rated hullwork tethers for EVA crews and cautious boarders.

extended_firearm_magazine.name: Extended firearm magazine
extended_firearm_magazine.description: A high-capacity magazine for common projectile weapons, useful but suspicious in secure habitats.

scum_servo_actuator.name: SCUM servo actuator
scum_servo_actuator.description: A hacked industrial servo with SCUM firmware hooks and a worrying torque curve.

encrypted_data_slug.name: Encrypted data slug
encrypted_data_slug.description: A sealed memory slug with tamper alarms and enough encryption to make ownership dangerous.

recycled_oxygen_scrubber.name: Recycled oxygen scrubber
recycled_oxygen_scrubber.description: A refurbished air scrubber cartridge for habitat crawlspaces, emergency pods, and marginal ships.

radiation_dosimeter.name: Radiation dosimeter
radiation_dosimeter.description: A calibrated badge meter that records exposure spikes for work crews and later arguments.

radiation.effect: Records exposure and warns of active radiation hazards; it does not reduce Rads.

reinforced_coolant_hose.name: Reinforced coolant hose
reinforced_coolant_hose.description: A pressure-rated transfer hose for shipboard coolant, fuel-adjacent fluids, and improvised bypasses.

airlock_mag_coupling.name: Airlock mag-coupling
airlock_mag_coupling.description: A magnetic coupling assembly for airlocks, hatch collars, and docking clamps.

dave_sidearm.name: DAVE sidearm
dave_sidearm.description: A surplus compliance pistol with DAVE inventory marks filed down badly.

terragrow_genetic_sample.name: Terragrow genetic sample
terragrow_genetic_sample.description: A cold-chain biological sample with Terragrow trace markers and resale value to the wrong lab.

xenon_propellant_cell.name: Xenon propellant cell
xenon_propellant_cell.description: A high-yield xenon canister useful for specialized thrusters and very specific buyers.

jovian_hive_relay_booster.name: Jovian Hive relay booster
jovian_hive_relay_booster.description: A signal booster tuned for Hive relay pods and magnetosphere-bent telemetry.

dave_master_encryption_dongle.name: DAVE master encryption dongle
dave_master_encryption_dongle.description: A hardware key for DAVE audit systems, dangerous to carry and lucrative to sell.

sabre_precooler_filter.name: SABRE pre-cooler filter assembly
sabre_precooler_filter.description: A precision heat exchanger assembly pulled from SABRE engine hardware.

quantum_mesh_routing_node.name: Quantum mesh routing node
quantum_mesh_routing_node.description: A prototype TL3 routing core with fragile quantum-mesh timing hardware.

unregistered_cybernetic_arm.name: Unregistered cybernetic arm
unregistered_cybernetic_arm.description: A boxed replacement limb with serials scrubbed and no legal surgical chain of custody.

ship_grade_thermal_sink.name: Ship-grade thermal sink
ship_grade_thermal_sink.description: A compact heat sink cartridge meant for drives, weapons, or overworked reactor auxiliaries.

terragrow_agricultural_ledger.name: Terragrow agricultural ledger
terragrow_agricultural_ledger.description: A classified Terragrow yield, genetics, and ownership ledger with blackmail-grade metadata.

super_fertilizer_concentrate.name: Super-fertilizer concentrate
super_fertilizer_concentrate.description: An experimental Terragrow concentrate that can save a dome farm or poison one.

pos_antimatter_micro_capsule.name: POS antimatter micro-capsule
pos_antimatter_micro_capsule.description: A sealed 0.1 ug antimatter containment capsule with POS custody warnings still active.

jovian_skimmer_heat_tile.name: Jovian skimmer heat shield tile
jovian_skimmer_heat_tile.description: An ablative heat shield tile from a Jovian atmospheric skimmer, still valuable as material science proof.

fusion_ignition_catalyst.name: Fusion ignition catalyst cartridge
fusion_ignition_catalyst.description: A TL4 catalyst cartridge used to stabilize violent fusion starts in compact plant hardware.

stealth_transponder_drive.name: Stealth transponder drive
stealth_transponder_drive.description: A military-grade spoofing module for ship or beacon identity systems.

extremophile_culture_bank.name: Pioneer extremophile culture bank
extremophile_culture_bank.description: A sealed bank of Pioneer Research extremophile cultures and growth media.

precollapse_fusion_core.name: Pre-collapse fusion core
precollapse_fusion_core.description: An intact ancient compact fusion core with enough signatures to start a war over provenance.

black_site_master_keycard.name: Black-site master keycard
black_site_master_keycard.description: A root-access credential for a facility that officially never existed.

relic_plasma_cutter.name: Relic plasma cutter
relic_plasma_cutter.description: A pre-collapse cutting torch able to slice hull alloy like shop plastic when it behaves.

persephone_lattice_fragment.name: Persephone lattice matrix fragment
persephone_lattice_fragment.description: A perfected lattice fragment with anomalous material properties and too many interested owners.

rocket_man_sabre_schematic.name: Rocket Man SABRE ignition schematic
rocket_man_sabre_schematic.description: The Rocket Man's original SABRE ignition schematic, complete with notes nobody should trust blindly.

terragrow_continuity_index.name: Terragrow continuity master index
terragrow_continuity_index.description: A master biological continuity index tying Terragrow seed lines, vaults, and illegal backups together.

metric_drive_calibration_coil.name: Metric drive calibration coil
metric_drive_calibration_coil.description: A TL4 calibration coil for metric drive work that most legal yards would deny recognizing.

von_neumann_archival_shard.name: Von Neumann archival data shard
von_neumann_archival_shard.description: A Proxima-origin archival shard from a von Neumann system, valuable even if nobody can fully parse it.

pos_antimatter_algorithm_key.name: POS antimatter containment key
pos_antimatter_algorithm_key.description: A containment algorithm key used by POS antimatter silos and audited only under armed supervision.

curvature_telemetry_array.name: Curvature telemetry array
curvature_telemetry_array.description: A prototype sensor array for reading local spacetime curvature during drive-scale events.

vacc_fresher.name: Vacc fresher
vacc_fresher.description: A portable atmospheric compressor and scrubber for refreshing suit oxygen bottles from usable air.

vacc_suit.name: Standard vacc suit
vacc_suit.description: A TL4 pressure suit for vacuum and hostile surfaces. It has basic radiation protection, radio, self-sealing fabric, and the usual movement penalty.

radiation.effect: Protects against ordinary cosmic background exposure but not serious radiation events.

vacc_suit.mechanics: Functions as AC 13 but cannot be worn with other armor. Applies -2 to movement-based hit rolls and skill checks unless the wearer has substantial zero-g/vacc experience. Uses one type A cell per 12 hours and can suffer suit tears from edged hits.

vacc_skin.name: Vacc skin
vacc_skin.description: A TL5 skin-tight vacuum suit that can be worn with armor, recycles air and waste, and avoids the bulk of a standard suit.

radiation.effect: Protects against ordinary cosmic background exposure but not serious radiation events.

vacc_skin.mechanics: Can be worn with armor and gives no AC by itself. It avoids the standard vacc suit movement penalty, recycles atmosphere and waste, and uses one type A cell per 24 hours. It can still suffer suit tears.

kibble_day.name: Kibble day
kibble_day.description: One day of ship-grade calories from the shared stores. Nutritious, joyless, and optimized for storage more than morale.

sludge_standard.name: Standard sludge bulb
sludge_standard.description: A sealed bulb of processed protein slurry used by stations that have solved survival but not taste.

sludge_recycled.name: Recycled sludge bulb
sludge_recycled.description: A cheaper slurry batch with a processing history nobody wants printed on the label.

sludge_fortified.name: Fortified sludge bulb
sludge_fortified.description: Sludge with extra minerals, anti-nausea additives, and a mild binder for crews living near reactor or hull work.

radiation.effect: Supports recovery routines after radiation exposure but does not reduce Rads by itself.

fresh_produce_crate.name: Fresh produce crate
fresh_produce_crate.description: A fragile crate of real greens, fruiting crops, or algae cuts. It is morale, leverage, and spoilage risk in one box.

radiation.effect: During proper downtime and medical care, fresh produce can support GM-approved Rad recovery. It does not reduce Rads by itself.

fresh_produce_crate.mechanics: Track as crew-days rather than individual meals. Spoils or loses value quickly without refrigeration or active ship stores.

clean_water_canister.name: Clean water canister
clean_water_canister.description: A sealed water canister with traceable purity tags. Worth more than credits in the wrong habitat.

iodine_rad_salt_pack.name: Iodine rad-salt pack
iodine_rad_salt_pack.description: A ration additive used before known exposure windows. It helps protect specific organs but is not treatment for chronic radiation poisoning.

radiation.effect: Preventive support for specific radiation exposure scenarios; only modifies Rads if a scenario rule says it does.
